name: lux-night-monorepo
description: Self-hostable nightlife and event ticketing platform for venues, clubs, promoters, and small event operators.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:customer && pnpm run build:internal && pnpm run build:admin
scripts.type-check: tsc -p apps/customer-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/internal-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/admin-web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/security/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.ci: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm build
